mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEM_JOIN_INFO ( user_id, user_pw, user_name, nickname, email_id, email_addr, birth_date, gender, reg_ip, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{nickname}, #{emailId}, #{emailAddr}, #{birthDate}, #{gender}, #{regIp}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_JOIN_INFO WHERE user_id = #{userId}
